quote: Haven Hands made finding a house help so easy. Grace has been with us for 6 months now and she's amazing. The background check gave us confidence from day one.
We were skeptical about using an agency, but the training quality at Haven Hands convinced us. Our nanny Faith is professional, caring, and our kids love her.
The replacement guarantee was a lifesaver. When our first match didn't work out, they quickly found us a better fit. No questions asked.
As a single parent, I needed someone I could trust completely. Haven Hands understood my concerns and matched me with Ann, who's been wonderful with my daughter.
We've used Haven Hands twice now — once for a nanny and once for elderly care for my mother. Both times, the service was excellent and the caregivers were well-trained.
I was hesitant about the registration fee, but the training program was worth every shilling. I learned skills I never had before and got placed within a week.
